backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing an ICDex grid trading bot with configurable interval, spread, and order count, plus timer-driven trading loop, order cancellation, and public query/control endpoints.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the Vite/TSX module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing the full dashboard layout with a sticky header, footer, and a grid of BotControlPanel, ConfigurationPanel, MarketDataPanel, GridPreviewTable, and OpenOrdersPanel.
React panel component displaying bot running/stopped status with animated indicator and Start/Stop buttons that call the corresponding React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: React form panel for editing intervalSeconds, spreadBps, and numOrders bot configuration fields, with client-side validation and a Save button that calls the setConfig mutation.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Displays a sortable table of the bot's last computed grid orders (buys and sells) with loading skeletons, empty state, and a manual refresh button.
Shows the latest mid price for the ICP/ckUSDT pair fetched from the backend, with loading/empty states and a refresh button.
Renders the list of currently open orders on the exchange, grouped by buy/sell side, with error handling, loading skeletons, and a refresh button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor/identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity persistence via AuthClient, and a React provider/hook pair.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend canister calls including bot status, config, mid price, grid, open orders, and mutations for starting/stopping the bot and updating config.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports JetBrains Mono and Inter fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a terminal-inspired dark color theme using OKLCH CSS variables for both light and dark modes, including custom utility classes for buy/sell/neutral states and scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the theme with JetBrains Mono/Inter fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (border, primary, sidebar, terminal buy/sell/neutral), custom border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file (version 17) describing the ICP/ckUSDT trading bot built in Motoko, its current architecture (20-order grid strategy, 60s timer, cancel-all-then-reposition approach), known issues, and a list of implemented frontend/backend features.
